popularStory.headline: History of Henry "The Lion"(1129-1195)
popularStory.description: Henry the Lion (German: Heinrich der Löwe; 1129/1131[1] – 6 August 1195[1]) was a member of the Welf dynasty and Duke of Saxony, as Henry III, from 1142, and Duke of Bavaria, as Henry XII, from 1156, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria於1129年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 拉文斯包格時，他的父親Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern27歲，母親Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen17歲。他於大約1152年與Clémence von Zähringen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1195年8月6日在德國布勞恩史維享年66歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria于1129年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 拉文斯包格时，他的父亲Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern27岁，母亲Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen17岁。他于大约1152年与Clémence von Zähringen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1195年8月6日在德国布勞恩史維享年66岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇布勞恩史維-盧包格布勞恩史維。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: "The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Lion"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Derivative of   Leo  , from the oblique case. This form is common as a Jewish name, but recently has also acquired wider currency. The lion is an important symbol among Jews because of Jacob's dying pronouncement that ‘Judah is a lion's whelp’ (Genesis 49:9).

en.lifeSummary: When Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria was born in 1129, in Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern, was 27 and his mother, Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, was 17. He married Clémence von Zähringen about 1152. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 August 1195, in Brunswick, Germany, at the age of 66, and was buried in Braunschweig, Brunswick-Lüneburg, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.Augsberg, Bayern, Germany: Augsberg, Illschwang, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria est né en 1129, à Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Clémence von Zähringen environ 1152. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 août 1195, à Braunschweig, Allemagne, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Saint-Empire romain.

de.Augsberg, Bayern, Germany: Augsberg, Illschwang, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria 1129 in Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern 27 und seine Mutter Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen 17. Er hat um 1152 Clémence von Zähringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. August 1195 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Braunschweig, Deutschland und wurde in Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria è nato il nel 1129 nel Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Clémence von Zähringen circa 1152. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1195, nel Braunschweig, Germania, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavariaが1129年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス ラベンスブルグで生まれた時，父Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayernは27歳，母Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsenは17歳であった。約1152年にClémence von Zähringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1195年8月6日にドイツブラウンスチウエイグで66歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチブラウンスチウエイグ-ルuネブルグブラウンスチウエイグにて埋葬された。

ko.Augsberg, Bayern, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 이슈왕 오그스버그
ko.lifeSummary: Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria(이)가 1129년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 레이븐스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1152년 Clémence von Zähringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년 8월 6일 독일 브라슈위그에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 브라슈위그-u니버그 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria nasceu em 1129, em Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence von Zähringen aproximadamente 1152. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1195, em Braunschweig, Alemanha, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.Augsberg, Bayern, Germany: аугсбирг, иллщванг, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria родился в 1129 г. в местности ландкрис равенсбург, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence von Zähringen около 1152 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 августа 1195 г. в местности браунщвиг, Германия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг-лuнебург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria nació en 1129, en Landkreis Ravensburg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich X. der Stolze Herzog von Bayern, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Gertrud von Süpplingenburg von Sachsen, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Clémence von Zähringen aproximadamente 1152. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1195, en Braunschweig, Alemania, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Braunschweig, Braunschweig-Lüneburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
